c74object.name: fluid.labelset~
c74object.digest: A set of labels associated with identifiers.
c74object.description: FluidLabelSet is a container associating identifiers with labels.

discussion.p: Read more about fluid.labelset~ on the learn platform.
fluid.labelset~ is part of the Fluid Decomposition Toolkit of the FluCoMa project. For more explanations, learning material, and discussions on its musicianly uses, visit flucoma.org.

method.name: reset
method.digest: Return the object to its original state
method.description: Calling reset will change parameter values back to those the object was created with, i.e. any attribute values set in the box will be retained

method.name: refer
method.description: Changes the reference to the data in another named fluid.labelset~ object. Changes to the data stored in any referenced will be shared by all other similarly named fluid.labelset~ objects.

description.p: Add a label to the FluidLabelSet.

ul.li:
identifier:
The identifier for this label.

description.p: Retrieve the label associated with an identifier. Will report an error if the identifier is not present in the set.

ul.li:
identifier:
The identifier for the label to be retrieved.

description.p: Delete a label given a certain identifier.

ul.li:
identifier:
The identifier to be deleted.

description.p: Update a label for a given identifier in the label set.

ul.li:
identifier:
The identifier for this label.

description.p: Set a label for a given identifier.

ul.li:
identifier:
The identifier for this label.

description.p: Merge sourceLabelSet in the current LabelSet. It will replace the label with the same identifier if overwrite is set to 1.

ul.li:
sourceLabelSet:
The source LabelSet to be merged.

overwrite:
A flag to allow overwrite labels with the same identifier.

method.name: dump
method.digest: Dump the state of this object from the dump outlet as a dict.

method.name: load
method.description: Replace the internal state of the object from a dict. The message should take the form load dictionary <dictid>

description.p: Post an abbreviated content of the label set in the window by default, but you can supply a custom action instead.
The number of data points (entries / observations) in this model or dataset / labeset
The number of columns (dimensions) in this model or dataset / labeset
Empty the label set and reset to a clean state.

method.name: write
method.description: Save the internal state of the object to a JSON file on disk. With no argument, a file dialog will appear to choose the file. It is always executed at the lowest priority on the main thread, using deferlow internally.

method.name: read
method.description: Replace the internal state of the object from a JSON file on disk. With no argument, a file dialog will appear to choose the file. It is always executed at the lowest priority on the main thread, using deferlow internally.

description.p: Export the LabelSet identifier to a FluidLabelSet.

ul.li:
labelSet:
The FluidLabelSet to export to. Its content will be replaced.

description.p: Enable warnings to be issued whenever a parameter value is constrained (e.g. clipped)
